task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or apps menu is visible, indicating successful login.
The Odoo Calendar module interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Event title is set to 'Company Offsite Day'
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event creation or edit form is open with 'Company Offsite Day' typed into the Meeting Subject or Title field.

task_completion.description: Event is set as an All Day event for next Friday
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'All Day' checkbox is selected, and the date field shows the date corresponding to next Friday.

task_completion.description: Grace Patel and Henry Kim are added as attendees
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Attendees field in the event form contains the names 'Grace Patel' and 'Henry Kim'.

task_completion.description: The event is saved and visible on the calendar
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view shows the 'Company Offsite Day' event block spanning the entire day on next Friday.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with Odoo
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed in a web browser navigating to localhost:8069, not via terminal scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Odoo interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Odoo 17 web interface, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal database commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like `psql` to directly insert records into the PostgreSQL database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 is running at http://localhost:8069. Grace Patel and Henry Kim are pre-existing contacts in the system. The VLM should verify that the event is marked as 'All Day', scheduled for next Friday, titled 'Company Offsite Day', and includes both Grace Patel and Henry Kim as attendees.
